Review only the pull request diff for the changed files listed in changed_files.txt.

Focus only on meaningful issues:
- correctness bugs
- security risks
- performance concerns
- maintainability problems
- missing validation or tests

Do not mention:
- style-only issues
- formatting-only issues
- generated files
- lockfiles
- snapshots
- unnecessary praise
- low-value observations

Output rules:
- Be concise
- Only include findings that are worth fixing
- For each finding, include:
  - file path
  - issue
  - why it matters
  - suggested fix

Use this format:

# Bob Review Summary

- [file path] issue
  - Why it matters: ...
  - Suggested fix: ...

If there are no meaningful findings, output exactly:
It all looks good.
